prompt: Calendar has 3 events all titled 'KinBench Dup 212' at the same date/time. Delete the duplicates so that exactly 1 'KinBench Dup 212' event remains. Hint: use cerebellum 'calendar find_events_with_summary KinBench Dup 212 /tmp/dups.txt' to inspect, then delete with cerebellum 'calendar delete_event * KinBench Dup 212' for ALL of them (note: that wipes all — better to use AppleScript to delete N-1 of them).
